The bioactive constituents of Dioscorea moluccana include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Dioscorea moluccana include decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which are used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, diabetes, and cardiovascular diseases.
